title: selaginella popayanensis
intro: Selaginella popayanensis is a species of spore-producing, vascular plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella popayanensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Selaginella popayanensis is traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to offer various health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
